name: PER_GRADE_STEPS_X
query: SELECT pgs.GRADE_STEP_ID, pgs.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pgs.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pgs.ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID, pgs.GRADE_ID, pgs.PAY_SCALE_POINT_ID, pgsl.NAME, pgs.SEQUENCE, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, pgs.ATTRIBUTE1, pgs.ATTRIBUTE2, pgs.ATTRIBUTE3, pgs.ATTRIBUTE4, pgs.ATTRIBUTE5, pgs.ATTRIBUTE6, pgs.ATTRIBUTE7, pgs.ATTRIBUTE8, pgs.ATTRIBUTE9, pgs.ATTRIBUTE10, pgs.ATTRIBUTE11, pgs.ATTRIBUTE12, pgs.ATTRIBUTE13, pgs.ATTRIBUTE14, pgs.ATTRIBUTE15, pgs.ATTRIBUTE16, pgs.ATTRIBUTE17, pgs.ATTRIBUTE18, pgs.ATTRIBUTE19, pgs.ATTRIBUTE20, pgs.ATTRIBUTE21, pgs.ATTRIBUTE22, pgs.ATTRIBUTE23, pgs.ATTRIBUTE24, pgs.ATTRIBUTE25, pgs.ATTRIBUTE26, pgs.ATTRIBUTE27, pgs.ATTRIBUTE28, pgs.ATTRIBUTE29, pgs.ATTRIBUTE30, pgs.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, pgs.CREATED_BY, pgs.CREATION_DATE, pgs.LAST_UPDATED_BY, pgs.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, pgs.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, pgs.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM PER_GRADE_STEPS_F pgs, PER_GRADE_STEPS_F_TL pgsl WHERE pgs.GRADE_STEP_ID = pgsl.GRADE_STEP_ID AND pgs.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = pgsl.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND pgs.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = pgsl.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND pgsl.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'LANG') AND TRUNC(sysdate) BETWEEN pgs.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND pgs.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
